title: Travel Quest
subTitle: Bill teams up with wildlife biologist and jaguar researcher Douglas Trent in search of the elusive big cat of South America; along the way, they visit Emas National Park, where they meet some of the locals.

title: Travel Quest
subTitle: Bill walks among giant penguin colonies, looks the deadly predatory leopard seal in the eyes and he mails a letter home from the most remote post office in the world.

subTitle: Bill ventures deep into the rainforest following the trail of headhunters, only to discover secrets that are even more surprising and deadly.

title: Poison(s)
subTitle: In November 2006, Alexander Litvinenko, the husband of Marina Litvinenko, gets poisoned with radioactive polonium; after three weeks of excruciating suffering, he dies, accusing a man: Vladimir Putin.

title: Lane 0. The lane of dreams
subTitle: Swimmers from developing countries, seeking to be the first to qualify for the Olympics for their respective nations, train at a state-of-the-art sports center in Thailand. These swimmers are used to training outdoors and overcoming many obstacles. Thanks to prestigious coaches, they will train for a year in a center.
